message:
feat: add 8 more modules to fast test runner

Added tests for:
- path: 10 tests (complete)
- fs: 5 tests (existsSync, read/write, readdir, stat, mkdir)
- crypto: 4 tests (randomBytes, sha256, md5, randomUUID)
- util: 3 tests (inspect, format, types)
- process: 6 tests (env, cwd, platform, arch, version, argv)
- events: 4 tests (on/emit, once, removeListener, listenerCount)
- assert: 4 tests (strictEqual, deepStrictEqual, throws, ok)
- os: 3 tests (platform, arch, cpus)

Total: 60+ tests across 9 modules, all using warm instance reuse.
